case_title: FREDERICK D. STRONG VS. RODNEY D. HILL et al

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-27-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR COMPLETION OF TRANSFER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RODNEY HILL AND SHIRLEY HUTCHINSON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (TO SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SOLANO COUNTY). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS TO THE FOLLOWING: DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THIS ACTION HAS BEEN IMPROPERLY VENUED IN SAN FRANCISCO AS IT IS NOT THE COUNTY OF DEFENDANTS' RESIDENCE NOR WHERE THE INJURY OCCURRED CCP SECTION 395(A). AS TO DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR EXPENSES/ATTORNEY FEES, ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1062 FOR HAVING TO BRING THIS MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRONG, FREDERICK D. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Ntc Of Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS RODNEY HILL AND SHIRLEY HUTCHINSON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (TO SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SOLANO COUNTY).

APPEARANCES: Jaime C. Uziel, Esq. of Sheppard, Rosen, Uziel & Sussman 296-0900 for pltf & opposing party; Laura C. Delehunt, Esq. of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP 510/433-2600 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as to the following: DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THIS ACTION HAS BEEN IMPROPERLY VENUED IN SAN FRANCISCO AS IT IS NOT THE COUNTY OF DEFENDANTS' RESIDENCE NOR WHERE THE INJURY OCCURRED CCP SECTION 395(a).
As to defendants' request for expenses/attorney fees, argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1062 FOR HAVING TO BRING THIS MOTION IS GRANTED. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
